top_signals.title: 9 nations back Ukraine’s Patriot alternative, Freyja — and want it flying in a year
top_signals.summary: Ballistic missiles are the one threat Ukraine can't stop with a weapon it makes itself.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nearly 300 GitHub repos pose as legit software to push malware
top_signals.summary: A threat actor has published hundreds of fake GitHub repositories impersonating legitimate software and security projects to distribute infostealer malware. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: South Korea to bring crypto under new state asset management law
top_signals.summary: The Ministry of Finance and Economy said it will establish the 'National Asset Basic Act' to update the government's asset management system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
